notes: Create is deterministic: skill deleted, policy calls `create_post` inline. Only the policy function and the flow class config are real artifacts; everything else is N/A.

sections.content: N/A. Create is deterministic and runs no LLM turn.

sections.label: Skill · intro
sections.content: N/A. Create has no skill file (deleted in Theme 1).

sections.label: Policy function
sections.note: Direct tool call with no LLM turn. Duplicate title surfaces as a confirmation ambiguity; plain failure becomes an error frame.
sections.content:
def create_policy(self, flow, state, context):
    tools = self.engineer.tools
    frame = DisplayFrame(flow.name())

    if not flow.is_filled():
        if not flow.slots['title'].check_if_filled():
            self.ambiguity.declare('specific',
                metadata={'missing_slot': 'title'},
                observation='Create needs a title for the new post.')
        elif not flow.slots['type'].check_if_filled():
            self.ambiguity.declare('specific',
                metadata={'missing_slot': 'type'},
                observation='Create needs to know whether this is a draft or a note.')
        return frame

    params = {
        'title': flow.slots['title'].values[0],
        'type': flow.slots['type'].values[0],
    }
    if flow.slots['topic'].check_if_filled():
        params['topic'] = flow.slots['topic'].values[0]

    result = tools('create_post', params)

    if result.get('_success'):
        new_id = result['post_id']
        state.active_post = new_id
        flow.status = 'Completed'
        frame.metadata.update({
            'post_id': new_id,
            'title': params['title'],
            'type': params['type'],
        })
        frame.blocks.append(Block(type='card', data={
            'post_id': new_id,
            'title': params['title'],
            'status': params['type'],
        }))
        return frame

    if result.get('_error') == 'duplicate':
        self.ambiguity.declare('confirmation',
            metadata={'duplicate_title': params['title']},
            observation=f"A post titled '{params['title']}' already exists. Create a new one anyway?")
        return frame

    frame.metadata['violation'] = 'tool_error'
    frame.metadata['failed_tool'] = 'create_post'
    frame.code = result.get('_message', '')
    return frame
